acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Nightly deep checks run `nix develop -c just security` before long-running coverage or mutation steps.
PR and main CI behavior remains unchanged.
Evidence records focused security, workflow lint, and repo check commands.
No product runtime, capture, encode, transport, decode, render, presentation, cross-device, or latency claim is made.

realWorldValidation.evidence: Scheduled workflow ordering change only; `nix develop -c just security`, `nix develop -c actionlint .github/workflows/*.yml`, and `nix develop -c just check` passed.
